pr.title: itdosei: Remove unnecessary stack pad, remove unnecessary const, cleanup function names and add GET_* usage
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Cleanup-only itDosei PR that renamed Dosei item functions from generic it_3F14/fn/address-style names to itDosei-prefixed names across symbols, header declarations, implementation, and item logic table callsites. The implementation also removed one const zero float in favor of inline 0.0f literals, removed an unnecessary PAD_STACK in spawned logic, simplified a temporary boolean/block shape, and replaced some direct gobj->user_data or gobj->hsd_obj accesses with GET_ITEM/GET_JOBJ macros. Bot output reports one new .sdata2 data match for main/melee/it/items/itdosei.

key_files.role: Main implementation cleanup: function renames, removed const zero float, one PAD_STACK removal, GET_ITEM/GET_JOBJ use, and small source-shape simplifications.
evidence_refs: diff:src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c removes `const f32 it_804DC878 = 0.0f;` and replaces calls with `0.0f`
diff:src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c renames `it_3F14_Logic7_Spawned` to `itDosei_Logic7_Spawned` and similar Dosei functions
diff:src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c changes `Item* ip = gobj->user_data` to `GET_ITEM(gobj)` in several functions
diff:src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c changes `gobj->hsd_obj` to `GET_JOBJ(gobj)` in selected places

key_files.role: Header prototypes updated to match itDosei-prefixed renamed functions.
evidence_refs: diff:src/melee/it/items/itdosei.h changes prototypes such as `it_3F14_Logic7_Spawned` to `itDosei_Logic7_Spawned` and `fn_80281390` to `itDosei_80281390`

key_files.role: Item logic table callsites updated for renamed Dosei logic callbacks.
evidence_refs: diff:src/melee/it/it_3F14.c Dosei table changes callbacks from `it_3F14_Logic7_*` to `itDosei_Logic7_*`

key_files.role: Symbol names updated for renamed Dosei functions at existing text addresses and sizes.

what_changed: Renamed Dosei logic callbacks from `it_3F14_Logic7_*` to `itDosei_Logic7_*` in symbols, header, implementation, and the Dosei entry in `it_803F14C4`.

Renamed generic/address-style Dosei helpers such as `fn_80281390`, `fn_80281734`, `it_802817A0`, `it_80281C6C`, `it_80282074`, `it_80282BFC`, `fn_80282CD4`, and `it_80282DE4` to `itDosei_802...` names.
Removed `const f32 it_804DC878 = 0.0f;` and replaced uses with inline `0.0f` in `itDosei_FacingAngle` calls.
Removed an unnecessary `PAD_STACK(8)` from `itDosei_Logic7_Spawned`; other `PAD_STACK(8)` uses remain in collision functions shown by the diff.
Introduced or expanded GET macro usage in selected places, including `GET_ITEM(gobj)` and `GET_JOBJ(gobj)`.
Simplified a generated-looking local boolean/block in picked-up logic from an inner `not_msid_4` variable to `if (ip->msid != 4)`.
Bot report indicates `.sdata2` for `main/melee/it/items/itdosei` improved from 96.30% to 100.00%, with +3 matched bytes and no overall matched-data percentage change.

smart_moves.text: Kept renames synchronized across symbols, owning header, implementation, and item logic table callsites, reducing risk of stale prototypes or mismatched callback names.

Removed a named zero-float constant and used inline `0.0f`, which is consistent with avoiding unnecessary named literal storage when the diff provides no independent data-ownership evidence for the symbol.
Applied GET macros only in some local-access sites rather than rewriting every access pattern in the file, keeping the cleanup narrow.
evidence_refs: diff:src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c selected changes to `GET_ITEM(gobj)` and `GET_JOBJ(gobj)` while some `gobj->user_data` and `gobj->hsd_obj` uses remain

decomp_lessons.lesson: For focused cleanup PRs, address-style or table-prefix item functions can be renamed to item-prefixed names when all visible references are updated together: symbols, header prototypes, implementation definitions, and logic table callsites.

Do not keep a named float constant solely to stand in for zero; this PR removed `it_804DC878` and inlined `0.0f` at repeated callsites, with bot output reporting `.sdata2` completion for the itdosei unit.

When an access role is clear, using local project access macros like `GET_ITEM(gobj)` and `GET_JOBJ(gobj)` can make decompiled item code more idiomatic than repeated direct `gobj->user_data` or `gobj->hsd_obj` access.
evidence_refs: diff:src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c changes selected `gobj->user_data` and `gobj->hsd_obj` accesses to GET macros

naming_conventions.convention: Dosei item logic callbacks use `itDosei_Logic7_*` rather than the broader table prefix `it_3F14_Logic7_*` once the item identity is known.
Unknown Dosei-local helpers may still keep address suffixes, but with an item prefix: `itDosei_802...` instead of bare `fn_802...` or `it_802...`.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Remove narrow stack padding when it is no longer necessary for the cleaned source shape.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The slice does not include objdiff text for this exact stack-pad removal; bot report only reports data matching.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Inline a zero float literal instead of preserving a named const in `.sdata2` when the diff supports that the named constant is unnecessary.
evidence_refs: diff:src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c removes `it_804DC878` and replaces calls with `0.0f`
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Supported as a local tactic for this PR, not a broad claim that every float constant should be inlined.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Simplify generated-looking block/temporary boolean source forms when a direct condition expresses the same local logic.
evidence_refs: diff:src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c changes inner `int not_msid_4 = ip->msid != 4; if (not_msid_4)` to `if (ip->msid != 4)`
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: No explicit verification output is attached to this individual cleanup in the slice.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.feedback: Report for GALE01 showed matched data unchanged overall at 41.53%, with one new match: `main/melee/it/items/itdosei` `.sdata2` +3 bytes, 96.30% before to 100.00% after.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching `itDosei_80281390` or remaining `itDosei_802...` helpers to see if address-suffix names gained semantic names.
Search for other item files that removed named zero float constants in favor of inline `0.0f` and compare `.sdata2` report effects.
Search for remaining `PAD_STACK(8)` in `src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c` to determine whether later cleanup removed them with verifier evidence.
Search for GET_ITEM/GET_JOBJ adoption in item cleanup PRs to identify local macro-use conventions.

evidence_refs: metadata_json for PR identity, state, author, timestamps, changed files, and counts

notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice.
Diff evidence is strong for what changed, especially renames and local cleanup patterns.
Automation evidence reports a `.sdata2` data match, but the slice does not include narrow build, objdiff, or per-function text-match logs for each cleanup.

The diff excerpt for `itdosei.h` is truncated, but metadata and visible hunks are enough to identify header rename synchronization at a high level.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Synchronize item function renames across symbols, headers, implementation, and logic tables
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2612 shows a cleanup rename of Dosei item callbacks and helpers where `config/GALE01/symbols.txt`, `src/melee/it/items/itdosei.h`, `src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c`, and `src/melee/it/it_3F14.c` were updated together. This is a good candidate pattern for safe item-function naming cleanup when item identity is known.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Inline zero float instead of preserving unnecessary named const when data ownership is unsupported
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2612 removed `const f32 it_804DC878 = 0.0f;` from `itdosei.c` and replaced repeated `itDosei_FacingAngle(..., it_804DC878)` arguments with `0.0f`. The bot report then showed `main/melee/it/items/itdosei` `.sdata2` at 100.00%. Candidate lesson: if a named data symbol only represents a zero literal and no ownership evidence supports it, inline the literal rather than preserving fake storage.

source_update_candidates.title: itdosei item implementation and symbols touched by PR 2612 cleanup
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2612 touched `src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c`, `src/melee/it/items/itdosei.h`, `src/melee/it/it_3F14.c`, and `config/GALE01/symbols.txt` for Dosei item cleanup and synchronized function renames.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help future source/path lookup for Dosei item function naming and logic table wiring.

source_update_candidates.title: Consider documenting macro access cleanup as local idiom, not mandatory rewrite
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2612 title and diff show selected replacement of `gobj->user_data`/`gobj->hsd_obj` with `GET_ITEM(gobj)`/`GET_JOBJ(gobj)` in `itdosei.c`, while some direct accesses remain. Candidate guidance: use GET macros when they express the local object access idiom and help readability, but do not require broad churn unless verified.
source_update_candidates.reason: This may refine existing typed-field/header-inline guidance, but one PR is insufficient to make it a universal standard without curator review.

rejection_notes: Do not treat this PR as proof that all `gobj->user_data` or `gobj->hsd_obj` accesses should be replaced with GET macros; the diff applies the change selectively.
Do not claim full text-section matching for touched functions from this slice; the available automation report only mentions matched data and one `.sdata2` item.
Do not infer semantic behavior for `itDosei_802...` helpers beyond the item prefix; the PR keeps address suffixes for unknown helper roles.
